bio: Chart-topping and influential rapper Future is known for a uniquely fluid and melodic yet mumbling vocal style. He busted out of the South at the dawn of the 2010s with a flurry of mixtapes, high-charting albums, certified platinum singles, and contributions to several other hits as a featured artist, then continued to hover at the top of his game, both commercially and creatively, in the years that followed.

rows: Ran To Atlanta (feat. Future & Molly Santana)
Too Many Nights (feat. Don Toliver & with Future)
